channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: US citizen held by ICE despite judge seeing birth certificate
item.description: Juan Carlos Lopez-Gomez, who was born in the United States, was detained Wednesday in Florida by the state’s highway patrol and was charged with illegally entering the Sunshine State as an “unauthorized alien” under a state law that has been temporarily blocked by a judge, the Florida Phoenix news o
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KREX 5

item.title: Military officials identify two Marines killed in crash in New Mexico
item.description: Two Camp Pendleton Marines killed in a crash during a convoy movement in New Mexico Tuesday have been identified.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, KTLA 5

item.title: Trump administration takes aim at Harvard's international students and tax-exempt status
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration has escalated its ongoing battle with Harvard, threatening to block the university from enrolling international students as the president called for withdrawing Harvard’s tax-exempt status.
item.dc:creator: ANNIE MA, FATIMA HUSSEIN and ALIA WONG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump has privately discussed firing Jerome Powell for months: Source
item.description: President Trump has privately discussed firing Jerome Powell for several months, a source confirms to NewsNation.
item.dc:creator: Kevin Bohn, NewsNation

item.title: Lawmakers move to mandate the display of Ten Commandments and ban pride flags in Alabama schools
item.description: MONTGOMERY, Ala. (AP) — Alabama lawmakers approved a slew of bills on Thursday that would expand the use of Christian texts in public schools and limit protections for LGBTQ+ students, in lockstep with a national conservative agenda that has divided statehouses across the country.
item.dc:creator: SAFIYAH RIDDLE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Train collides with funeral home limo in Tennessee; family of 6 injured
item.description: A funeral limo en route to a funeral — and carrying a family to the funeral — was struck by a train in Tennessee.
item.dc:creator: David Royer, Fox 5

item.title: Train collides with funeral home limo in Tennessee; family of 6 injured
item.description: A funeral limo en route to a funeral — and carrying a family to the funeral — was struck by a train on Thursday in Tennessee.
item.dc:creator: David Royer, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Michigan and Pennsylvania join six other states with measles outbreaks. Here's what to know
item.description: Michigan officials confirmed a new measles outbreak Thursday near Grand Rapids, bringing the U.S. to eight states with active outbreaks of the vaccine-preventable disease. Earlier this week, Pennsylvania declared an outbreak in Erie County as well. Last week, U.S.
item.dc:creator: DEVI SHASTRI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump calls FSU shooting a ‘shame,’ says he’ll always protect Second Amendment
item.description: President Trump on Thursday called a deadly shooting at Florida State University (FSU) "terrible," but he dismissed the possibility of it spurring any changes to gun laws in the country. "Look, I'm a big advocate of the Second Amendment. I have been from the beginning.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: White House proposes eliminating Head Start funding as part of sweeping budget cuts
item.description: The Trump administration is asking Congress to eliminate funding for Head Start, a move that would cut early education for more than half a million of the nation’s neediest children and child care for their families.
item.dc:creator: JOCELYN GECKER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Two dead and 6 injured in Florida State shooting; gunman is deputy's son, police say
item.description: Authorities identified the suspected shooter as a 20-year-old student who is also the son of a local sheriff's deputy.
item.dc:creator: Alaina Papazian, ABC 4

item.title: Florida State gunman used deputy mom's former service weapon to kill 2 and wound 6, authorities say
item.description: Investigators say the 20-year-old son of a sheriff’s deputy opened fire at Florida State University with his mother’s former service weapon, killing two men and wounding at least six others.
item.dc:creator: Kate Payne And David Fischer, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Undelivered: Two weeks with no mail for some Virginia residents
item.description: Issues at a Virginia post office have caused some residents in Suffolk to go nearly two weeks without mail delivery.
item.dc:creator: Jimmy LaRoue, NewsNation

item.title: Burchett signals support for sending US criminals to El Salvador
item.description: Rep. Tim Burchett (R-Tenn.) on Wednesday defended President Donald Trump’s suggestion that U.S. citizens convicted of violent crimes be sent to Salvadoran prisons.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: New York family told missing woman was found dead, only to learn she's living in Detroit
item.description: A New York family is navigating an emotional journey after learning their sister, whom officials declared dead last year, is actually alive and living out of state.
item.dc:creator: Isabel Garcia, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Kamala Harris dominates in California governor's race poll
item.description: Former Vice President Kamala Harris would enjoy a wide lead over the rest of the field if she were to enter the 2026 race for California governor, according to an Inside California Politics/Emerson College poll released Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, Fox 5

item.title: 3 dead in multi-boat crash during Major League Fishing tournament in Alabama
item.description: A fatal boat crash during a Major League Fishing tournament in Alabama is currently under investigation.
item.dc:creator: Austin Franklin, WFLA, NBC

item.title: China-founded e-commerce sites Temu, Shein say they're raising prices due to tariffs
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — China-founded e-commerce sites Temu and Shein say they plan to raise prices for U.S.
item.dc:creator: MAE ANDERSON AP Business Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tennessee’s GOP leads the fight to deny public education to children without documents
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Damian Felipe Jimenez has many dreams about his future — he could be a restaurant owner, a scientist or maybe something else.
item.dc:creator: KIMBERLEE KRUESI and KRISTIN M. HALL, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump administration plans to eliminate habitat protections for endangered species
item.description: (AP) -- The Trump administration plans to eliminate habitat protections for endangered and threatened species in a move environmentalists say would lead to the extinction of critically endangered species because of logging, mining, development and other activities.
item.dc:creator: TAMMY WEBBER, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Handyman named person of interest after missing woman's body found buried in concrete
item.description: A missing woman was found buried and partially encased in concrete more than a week after she went missing. Now, deputies are questioning her handyman for his possible role in her disappearance and death.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, ABC 4

item.title: Lost toddler found miles from home by dog that guided him to safety, sheriff says
item.description: When an Arizona toddler wandered away from home Monday, a team of deputies, search and rescue volunteers and rangers began their search. In the end, it was a protective pup who track down the 2-year-old.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, WGN 9

item.title: How war, money and the quest for discovery entwined the US government and universities
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The showdown between the Trump administration and Harvard University is spotlighting bare-knuckled politics and big dollar figures. But in the battle of the moment, it’s easy to lose sight of a decades-long alliance between the U.S.
item.dc:creator: ADAM GELLER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Autism rates climb to 1 in 31 in kids; Experts debate causes and solutions
item.description: Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has cited research that documents up to a 400% increase in autism cases over the last several decades and is calling for more resources to be devoted to autism studies, but experts want to make sure the lens is pointed in the right direction.
item.dc:creator: Dina Bair, WGN 9

item.title: North Bay town named among 'best in the West' by USA Today
item.description: (KRON) -- One of the best small towns in the western part of the country is here in the Bay Area, according to USA Today's "10Best" rankings. Healdsburg, located in Sonoma County, was ranked as the third-best small town to visit.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Michelle Trachtenberg's cause of death revealed
item.description: Michelle Trachtenberg's cause of death has finally been revealed, less than two months after the actress was found dead in her New York City apartment.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, KTLA 5

item.title: Maryland Sen. Van Hollen meets with Abrego Garcia in El Salvador amid court fight over US return
item.description: Maryland Sen. Chris Van Hollen has met in El Salvador with Kilmar Abrego Garcia, a man who was sent there by the Trump administration in March despite an immigration court order preventing his deportation.
item.dc:creator: Mary Clare Jalonick And Matthew Brown, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: DOJ announces civil suit against Maine over transgender athletes
item.description: Attorney General Pam Bondi on Tuesday announced a civil lawsuit against Maine’s Department of Education for violating Title IX, the federal law against sex discrimination that the Trump administration has said prohibits transgender students from participating in girls’ and women’s sports in schools.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, WGN 9

item.title: Newsom says California will sue over Trump tariffs
item.description: California Gov. Gavin Newsom and Attorney General Rob Bonta announced plans to sue the Trump administration over recent tariffs.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: The Oklahoma City bombing was 30 years ago. Some survivors worry America didn’t learn the lesson
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — Thirty years after a truck bomb detonated outside a federal building in America's heartland, killing 168 people in the deadliest homegrown attack on U.S. soil, deep scars remain.
item.dc:creator: SEAN MURPHY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Man in tactical gear attacks officers with pepper spray at Boston-area courthouse, video shows
item.description: Police in a Boston suburb have arrested a man who they say entered a courthouse while wearing a gas mask and tactical gear and attacked several people with pepper spray.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Wink Martindale, game show host and Elvis Presley interviewer, dies at 91
item.description: Wink Martindale, the genial host of such hit game shows as “Gambit” and “Tic-Tac-Dough” who also did one of the first recorded television interviews with a young Elvis Presley, has died. He was 91.
item.dc:creator: By BETH HARRIS Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Biden alleges Trump has 'taken a hatchet' to Social Security in his first post-presidency speech
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Former President Joe Biden warned on Tuesday that President Donald Trump has “taken a hatchet” to Social Security, weighing in on a critical issue for millions of Americans as the 82-year-old Democrat briefly returned to the national stage.
item.dc:creator: STEVE PEOPLES and FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: No jurors picked on first day of Harvey Weinstein’s #MeToo retrial
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — As jury selection began Tuesday in Harvey Weinstein’s New York City rape retrial, some prospective jurors made clear they couldn't be fair in judging the one-time Hollywood mogul-turned-#MeToo pariah.
item.dc:creator: JENNIFER PELTZ and MICHAEL R. SISAK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Georgia man arrested over alleged threats to kill Tulsi Gabbard
item.description: A Georgia man was arrested after federal authorities said he made numerous death threats against Director of National Intelligence (DNI) Tulsi Gabbard, the Justice Department announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, Fox 5

item.title: Pixar Putt will be swinging into Riverton with family fun mini golf experience
item.description: Fans of "Toy Story", "The Incredibles", and more Pixar classics, get ready for a fun family activity coming to Riverton.
item.dc:creator: Kayla Baggerly, ABC 4

item.title: Trump not expected to attend White House Correspondents' dinner
item.description: President Donald Trump is not expected to attend next weekend's White House Correspondents' dinner, The Hill confirmed on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, Fox 5
